extensions.summary: Client-centric runtime profile without dedicated server binaries by default.

stability.rationale: Client profile id is frozen for mock release, while optional launcher/setup composition remains provisional.
stability.replacement_target: Refine client profile contents once release indices and remote acquisition are formalized.

extensions.summary: Full MVP bundle with all default runtime products and default instance artifacts.

stability.rationale: Full profile id is user-facing and frozen, but component selection stays provisional until release indices and trust policy are formalized.
stability.replacement_target: Replace selector contents with release-index governed install profiles.

stability.rationale: SDK profile is a forward-compatibility placeholder only and is not enabled by default in the mock release.
stability.replacement_target: Replace the SDK placeholder with release-index governed SDK components and acquisition policy.

extensions.summary: Authoritative server runtime profile with required content but no rendered client binary.

stability.rationale: Server profile id is frozen for mock release, while bundled management surfaces remain provisional.
stability.replacement_target: Refine server profile contents once update model and remote acquisition are formalized.

extensions.summary: Offline verification and store-management surface with no client/server runtime by default.

stability.rationale: Tools profile id is frozen for mock release, while optional launcher/docs composition remains provisional.
stability.replacement_target: Refine tools profile once dedicated tool components and update policy are formalized.
